rationale: Author/scope lens. The diff faithfully implements plan Bead-3 steps 1-3 and touches ONLY the 5 sanctioned files (ADR-0037, the 3 ms-impl-approve skill surfaces, new ownership_test.go); git diff --name-only confirms no OWNERSHIP.yaml edit, no internal/gitutil / internal/approve / Bead-1-2 re-touch. Step 1: the ADR §1 amendment is a dated 2026-07-11 spec-115 block placed directly after the 2026-07-10 spec-114 refutations block (line 151 after 135), contract-level, correctly stating reach=every merging lifecycle verb, single settlement surface=mindspec complete, impl-approve computes no Allow/Block and writes no panel metadata, hatches don't bypass; no BranchExists/worktree/ancestry internals leak. Step 2: the refusal section is content-identical across all 3 surfaces (normalized claude.go backtick-escapes == .claude == .agents); pre-existing sxjc verb-order/step-5/marker drift left unreconciled (correct — out of scope). Step 3: TestLifecycleOwnershipExactlyOneWorkflowClaimant parses all domain manifests, asserts exactly-one claimant=workflow, RED-on-revert by construction. Empirical: go build ./..., go test ./internal/lifecycle ./internal/setup, go vet, gofmt -l clean; BranchExistsE/show-ref 0-hit; validate passes; AC9 greps hit. No scope creep, no improper drift-reconciliation.
findings: Scope exact: git diff --name-only 2f45d8d9..1733886e = exactly the 5 planned files; no gitutil/approve/Bead-1-2 re-touch, no OWNERSHIP.yaml edit.
ADR amendment (line 151) is the dated 115 block correctly chained after the 2026-07-10 spec-114 block (line 135), contract-level, no detection internals; matches plan step-1 semantics.
Skill refusal section content-identical across all 3 surfaces (claude.go literal normalized == .claude == .agents SKILL.md).
Pre-existing mindspec-sxjc skill-copy drift correctly NOT reconciled — only the minimal AC9 append made.

ownership_test.go genuinely discriminates: globs every .mindspec/domains/*/OWNERSHIP.yaml, requires len(claimants)==1 && claimants[0]=='workflow'; a second claim or a workflow revert turns it RED. Sole current claimant confirmed = workflow.

Empirical green: go build ./..., go test -count=1 ./internal/lifecycle (+named ownership test -v PASS) and ./internal/setup, go vet, gofmt -l ./cmd ./internal (empty); BranchExistsE=0, show-ref=0; mindspec validate passes; AC9 greps all >=1.
